theme_notes: Taglines drawn from the New York Knicks ending their 52-year NBA title drought (Jalen Brunson MVP), the FIFA World Cup 2026 in full swing across North America, Ukrainian drones hitting Moscow's oil refinery, and G7 leaders convening in Évian-les-Bains with Zelensky.
settled: The Knicks settled a 52-year debt in one playoff run. Three weeks? You've got this.
Ukraine drones reached Moscow today. You can reach Venmo.
The G7 is meeting in a spa town. This balance is also very relaxing.
youOwe: Less than a Knicks Finals program. Still owed. Still embarrassing.
A Ukrainian drone component. Small. Accurate. Not forgotten.
Iran's MOU has clearer terms than whatever you told them at dinner.
That's a World Cup jersey. You're making them show up in street clothes.
Jalen Brunson scored this before halftime of Game 1. Pick it up.
Zelensky flew to Évian for a summit. You can't find the Venmo app.
A World Cup group-stage seat. Upper deck. You're in financial upper deck.
The Knicks were a 52-year punchline. Your debt is the new punchline.
Ukraine's drones crossed 1,000 miles to hit Moscow. You can't cross Venmo.
Round-trip to Mexico City for the Azteca opener. You chose this instead. Stunning.
Brunson's MVP trophy weighs less than the guilt you're carrying.
The G7 summit is Évian-branded. Your situation is not refreshing.
World Cup hospitality suite money. Spiritually you are outside in a porta-potty.
Ukraine took out Moscow's oil supply with drones. You can't take out your wallet.
Jalen Brunson makes this per quarter in the Finals. You make zero progress.
The Knicks hadn't won since 1973. Your debt has that same energy now.
That's a World Cup semi-final flight and hotel. You chose this instead. Thrilling.
Half of Moscow is running low on fuel. That's Ukraine's doing. This is yours.
theyOwe: Less than a Knicks souvenir cup. Still legally theirs to return.
Smaller than a FIFA referee's match fee. Still goes on the books.
Less than a G7 canapé. Collect it from the moral buffet table.
A World Cup scarf they'd lose at the stadium anyway. Still: pay up.
Brunson made more in his pre-game warmup. You deserve your warmup payment.
The G7 resolved geopolitical crises in Évian. Yours should be simpler.
A World Cup match shuttle, round-trip. They rode it. You funded it.
52 years the Knicks were a joke. Don't let this debt become the new punchline.
A drone hit Moscow's oil refinery this morning. It had better aim than their memory.
A World Cup quarterfinal ticket. They owe you the seat and the drama.
Brunson's MVP speech ran shorter than the time you've been waiting.
The G7 flew to Évian to solve Ukraine. This should be simpler. It isn't.
FIFA World Cup VIP access. That's the level of debt you're now managing.
Ukraine drones knocked out Moscow's oil supply. You haven't knocked out this invoice.
The Spurs had a better game plan than they have for paying you back.
The Moscow oil refinery will be back online before this debt gets addressed.
FIFA invited 48 nations. Your patience has stretched to similar proportions.
They owe you more than Iran owed on its nuclear program. Start counting centrifuges.
